blocks.content: For JavaScript developers, ADK offers a fully typed TypeScript/Node.js SDK library to manage asynchronous executions.

blocks.title: ES Modules
blocks.content: The Node.js SDK utilizes modern ES modules. Ensure your package.json has 'type': 'module' or use .mjs file extensions.

Question 1: How are executions managed in the Node.js SDK?
- A) Synchronous blocking threads
- B) Asynchronous promises using async/await
- C) Callback event emitters only

Feedback: Option B is correct. The SDK uses standard Promise APIs for async executions.
